prose:
Fukui descriptors for furan — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF, exact two-electron integrals; no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.  Geometry: supplied XYZ (/home/erobles/…/furan.xyz); the calculation is a single-point set of N, N+1, and N-1 SCFs on that fixed geometry (no relaxation).  

Most electrophilic site: C5 (atom index 4) with f⁺ = 1.9242931.  
Most nucleophilic site: the same carbon C5 with f⁻ = 0.1616371.  
Dual descriptor values mirror the f⁺/f⁻ trends; full per-atom arrays are in furan_fukui_dft.json.

Convergence: all three SCFs (neutral, cation, anion) converged.  The integrity block returned trustworthy = true.
